body:
## Problem
Users are unsure if their latest changes are safe (Auto-save Feedback).

## Impact
- High anxiety/uncertainty
- Lack of visibility of system status (Heuristic #1)

## Tasks
- [ ] Add a "Save Status" component to the Editor header
- [ ] Display "Syncing..." and "Saved [X] mins ago" states
- [ ] Implement `aria-live="polite"` for screen reader announcements of save status
- [ ] Show a specific "Offline" status when the connection is lost
title: [UX-02] Add Persistent "Saved" Status with `aria-live` Support
